nodes.name: Window
nodes.explanation: Root native window backdrop. Not a content layer or Liquid Glass content surface.

raw.name: Window
raw.explanation: Root native window backdrop. Not a content layer or Liquid Glass content surface.

nodes.name: MainViewHeader
nodes.explanation: Height = padding(4) + content(50) + padding(4) = 58px. Uses shared no-divider main-view header chrome.

raw.name: MainViewHeader
raw.explanation: Height = padding(4) + content(50) + padding(4) = 58px. Uses shared no-divider main-view header chrome.

nodes.name: MainViewContextZone
nodes.explanation: Three-zone launcher context row: cwd/Tab and agent-model/Shift+Tab live above the query input.

raw.name: MainViewContextZone
raw.explanation: Three-zone launcher context row: cwd/Tab and agent-model/Shift+Tab live above the query input.

nodes.name: MainViewInput
nodes.explanation: Shared main-view input fills the header width. Width = window(750) - horizontal padding(2 * 2) = 746px. Vertically centered in header.

raw.name: MainViewInput
raw.explanation: Shared main-view input fills the header width. Width = window(750) - horizontal padding(2 * 2) = 746px. Vertically centered in header.

nodes.name: MainViewMain
nodes.explanation: flex-grow:1 fills remaining height after header. Uses flex-row to create side-by-side panels.

raw.name: MainViewMain
raw.explanation: flex-grow:1 fills remaining height after header. Uses flex-row to create side-by-side panels.

nodes.name: ScriptList
nodes.explanation: Width = 375px. Uses uniform_list for virtualized scrolling with 44px item height.

raw.name: ScriptList
raw.explanation: Width = 375px. Uses uniform_list for virtualized scrolling with 44px item height.

nodes.name: PreviewPanel
nodes.explanation: Width = remaining 50% = 375px. Has 16px padding on all sides.

raw.name: PreviewPanel
raw.explanation: Width = remaining 50% = 375px. Has 16px padding on all sides.

nodes.name: ListItem[0]
nodes.explanation: Fixed height = 44px for Base Info Bar. Uses flex-row with theme gap 8.4px and padding 4px vertical / 14px horizontal.

nodes.name: MainViewFooter
nodes.explanation: Floating hint-strip footer overlay for Base Info Bar. Side inset 14px; inter-item gap 6px; button radius 6px.

raw.name: MainViewFooter
raw.explanation: Floating hint-strip footer overlay for Base Info Bar. Side inset 14px; inter-item gap 6px; button radius 6px.

appleReference.title: Get to know the new design system

constants.copyrightSafeSummary: Apple defines a capsule's curvature as half the control height.

appleReference.title: Get to know the new design system

constants.copyrightSafeSummary: Apple says nested rounded shapes should preserve concentric radii (inner = outer − inset).

derivation.notes: A free-standing glass element's default radius; NOT the launcher window/panel mask radius, which remains a separate native probe.

constants.copyrightSafeSummary: A default NSGlassEffectView rounds to 8pt on macOS 26.5 (measured); a free element default, not the window mask.
Native Tahoe titled/glass windows round at 15pt (measured, macOS 26.5); a launcher should be at least that rounded.
Apple accessibility guidance recommends ~12pt padding around bezeled elements (~24pt without a bezel).

derivation.notes: A plain input lane should match the native regular NSTextField horizontal inset (9pt); within the ~12pt bezel-padding soft band.

constants.copyrightSafeSummary: Native regular NSTextField insets its text 9pt horizontally on macOS 26.5 (measured).
Native regular NSTextField insets its text 3pt vertically on macOS 26.5 (measured).

unmeasured.failureReason: footer node lacks boxModel.gap; cannot measure inter-item spacing

constants.copyrightSafeSummary: Apple spatial-layout guidance gives a 60pt minimum center distance for regular buttons.
Apple recommends 16pt or more of visible gap between regular buttons.

derivation.formula: footer item gap should be >= ~12pt (bezel-padding floor); Apple's hard regular-control gap is 16pt
derivation.notes: Soft because footer hint chips are compact, non-bezeled controls Apple's HIG does not size explicitly.

constants.copyrightSafeSummary: Derived (soft): adjacent compact footer controls should keep ~12pt+ of gap; 6pt reads as cramped vs Apple's 16pt regular-control gap.
Native regular macOS control/body text is 13pt (measured, macOS 26.5); a launcher hero search field may run larger by design.
Native default line height for 13pt regular control/body text is 16pt (measured, macOS 26.5).
Native regular search/input text is Regular weight (trait 0 == 400); Semibold is reserved for emphasis, so input text must not be bold.

cornerRadiusTokens.note: smoke-only: positive-radius presence; numeric Apple comparison is appleDocumented.cornerGeometry
